zh.lifeSummary: 當John Murray於1465年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾時，他的父親Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool33歲，母親Marjory or Mariota Menzies28歲。他於1489年與Johanna Cockpool在蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1541年1月16日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾洛可比享年76歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Murray was born in 1465, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, was 33 and his mother, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, was 28. He married Johanna Cockpool in 1489, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 January 1541, in Lockerbie, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Murray est né en 1465, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Cockpool en 1489, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1541, à Lockerbie, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Januar 1541 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Lockerbie, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Murrayが1465年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルで生まれた時，父Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpoolは33歳，母Marjory or Mariota Menziesは28歳であった。1489年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルでJohanna Cockpoolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年1月16日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアロッカービで76歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Murray(이)가 1465년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory or Mariota Menzies(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1489년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 Johanna Cockpool(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 1월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 록르비에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Murray nasceu em 1465, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Cockpool em 1489, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1541, em Lockerbie, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Murray родился в 1465 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marjory or Mariota Menzies, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Cockpool в 1489 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1541 г. в местности локкирби, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Murray nació en 1465, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Marjory or Mariota Menzies, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Johanna Cockpool en 1489, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1541, en Lockerbie, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
